app.title: NEO SSH-Win Manager
panel.placeholder.title: Ready for the next step
panel.placeholder.body: Pick a connection on the left for details, or open settings to continue refining the setup.
dialog.lead.settings: Adjust language, theme and mount behavior in the same card layout as the web demo.
dialog.lead.addedit.add: Create a new connection with the same compact form blocks as the web version.
dialog.lead.addedit.edit: Edit host, authentication and mount target in the same compact card layout as the web version.
dialog.lead.users: Manage users, roles and password changes in one consistent card layout.
prereq.dialog.title: Missing Requirements
prereq.dialog.text_both:
WinFSP and SSHFS-Win are required to run this application.

Please install both packages and restart the program.
prereq.dialog.text_winfsp:
WinFSP is required to run this application.

Please install it and restart the program.
prereq.dialog.text_sshfs:
SSHFS-Win is required to run this application.

Please install it and restart the program.
mount.failed.title: Connection failed
mount.failed.troubleshoot:
Please check:
 • Is the device reachable on the network? (IP: {host})
 • Are credentials (password/key) correct?
 • Is the SSH service running on the target?
 • Is a firewall blocking port {port}?
unmount.failed.title: Disconnect failed
delete.title: Delete
edit.locked.title: Editing locked
edit.locked.msg:
This connection is currently mounted and cannot be edited.
Please disconnect first.
logout.title: Logout
logout.confirm:
Really log out?
All active mounts will be disconnected.
The application will close.
tray.running: Running in the notification area. Double-click to open.
settings.title: Settings
settings.security.level.label: Security level:
settings.security.warning.level1: ⚠ Risk: SSH keys without a passphrase can be used directly if the device is stolen.
settings.security.warning.level2: ⚠ Security risk: The password is passed as a command argument and is briefly visible in the Windows process list. With PuTTY enabled, exposure is slightly lower than with the native SSH client (password appears in putty.exe args instead of cmd.exe). Only enable if you fully understand the consequences.
settings.minimize_to_tray: Minimize to system tray on close
settings.telemetry.hint: Telemetry only sends an anonymous counter on install/login. No usernames, IPs or host data are collected.
settings.updates.hint: Manually check GitHub for a newer version
settings.use_putty: Use PuTTY instead of native SSH
settings.putty_hint:
Hint: PuTTY requires keys in .ppk format.
OpenSSH keys can be converted with PuTTYgen.
settings.language.label: Interface language
settings.language.restart: Language change takes effect after restart.
settings.theme.label: Interface theme
settings.ghosts_ok:
Ghost drives cleaned up.
Explorer is restarting…
settings.putty_missing: Please enter the path to putty.exe.
settings.create_shortcut.hint: Create a desktop shortcut to the currently running app
settings.create_shortcut.confirm: Info: A desktop shortcut to the currently running EXE will be created. If you move the EXE later, the shortcut becomes invalid. Create it anyway?
settings.create_shortcut.success: Shortcut has been created on the desktop.
about.title: About NEO SSH-Win Manager
about.desc:
A modern GUI frontend for sshfs-win.
Mount remote SSH filesystems as Windows drive letters.
about.what_it_does.title: Features
about.what_it_does.body: Mount remote SSH filesystems as Windows drive letters with one click. Multi-user support with encrypted credential storage. Built-in SSH terminal, system info panel, live tray toggles, and optional CLI companion for automation. Built on WinFsp + SSHFS-Win.
login.title: NEO SSH-Win Manager – Login
login.username_min: Username must have at least 3 characters.
login.password_min: Password must have at least 8 characters.
login.no_crypto:
cryptography is not installed.

Please run:
  pip install cryptography
users.title: User Management
users.delete.title: Delete user
users.delete.confirm: Really delete user '{name}' and all their connections?
users.reset.title: Reset password
users.reset.confirm:
Really reset password of '{name}'?

A new password will be generated and shown. Stored SSH passwords for this user will be lost (key-based connections are preserved).
users.username_min: Username must have at least 3 characters.
users.password_min: Password must have at least 8 characters.
chgpw.title: Change password
chgpw.new_min: New password must have at least 8 characters.
addedit.template.hint: All fields will be copied · Drive letter is adjusted automatically
addedit.label.name: Name
addedit.auth.ask.title: Choose authentication
addedit.auth.ask.prompt: How do you want to connect to '{name}'?
auth.enter_password.title: Enter password
addedit.placeholder.name: My Server
addedit.cli.label: CLI Access Key (128 char)
addedit.putty_key.label: PuTTY Key (.ppk)
addedit.putty_key.hint: Required for PuTTY terminal and system info. Convert OpenSSH keys with PuTTYgen.
addedit.required.title: Required fields
addedit.required.name: Name must not be empty.
addedit.name.invalid: Connection name contains invalid characters (allowed: letters, digits, spaces, - _ .)
addedit.name.hint: Allowed characters: letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, underscores, and dots.
sysinfo.title: System Info – {name}
sysinfo.no_data: No data received from server. Check SSH access.
sysinfo.key_required: An SSH key or password must be configured for this connection to display system information.
sysinfo.key_missing.title: Authentication Required
sysinfo.key_missing.desc:
Please configure an SSH key or password
for this connection.
sysinfo.auth.missing.title: Authentication Required
sysinfo.auth.missing.desc:
No SSH key or password configured for this connection.
Add an SSH key or password in the connection settings.
ssh.putty.pw_disabled:
Password login is not available for this connection.
Change the authentication method to SSH key, or adjust the security settings.
ssh.putty.pw_missing: No password stored for this connection.
dirty.title: Unsaved changes
dirty.body: There are unsaved changes. Discard them?
app.unexpected_error.title: Unexpected error
app.unexpected_error.body:
An unexpected error occurred.
The application will try to continue running.

Details were written to crash_report.txt.
profile.title: User Profile
addedit.groups.hint: Comma-separated list of groups or tags for organizing connections.
addedit.template.save_as_template.hint: Templates are reusable presets for creating new connections. They don't appear in the main list.
dialog.key_fallback.title: SSH Key Failed
dialog.key_fallback.message:
SSH key authentication failed for '{name}'.

A password is stored for this connection.
Do you want to try connecting with password instead?
debug.title: Debug Window
debug.subtitle: Internal events, mounting and SSH status in real-time
debug.subtitle.tooltip:
This window shows internal events, mounting status
and SSH-related information in real-time. Useful for troubleshooting and monitoring.
debug.test.no_user: No logged-in user found for test.
debug.password.empty.or.decryption.faile: Password is empty or decryption failed.
terminal.error_connect: SSH connection failed. Check host, credentials, and network.
terminal.host_key_dialog.title: Unknown Host Key
sftp.title: SFTP Browser — {name}
sftp.col.name: Name
sftp.error.title: SFTP Error

sftp.tofu.body:
